name: Carlos Alazraqui

films.title: Reno 911!: Miami
films.overview: A rag-tag team of Reno cops are called in to save the day after a terrorist attack disrupts a national police convention in Miami Beach during spring break. Based on the Comedy Central series.

films.title: Mickey's Magical Christmas: Snowed in at the House of Mouse
films.overview: When a huge snowstorm leaves everyone stranded, Mickey and all of his guests at the House of Mouse, including Pooh, Belle, Snow White, Cinderella, Ariel and many more of his old and new friends, break out the cookies and hot chocolate to help Donald mend his tattered Christmas spirit.

films.title: Batman: Under the Red Hood
films.overview: One part vigilante, one part criminal kingpin, Red Hood begins cleaning up Gotham with the efficiency of Batman, but without following the same ethical code.

films.title: Justice League: Doom
films.overview: An adaptation of Mark Waid's "Tower of Babel" story from the JLA comic. Vandal Savage steals confidential files Batman has compiled on the members of the Justice League, and learns all their weaknesses.

films.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 1
films.overview: Batman has not been seen for ten years. A new breed of criminal ravages Gotham City, forcing 55-year-old Bruce Wayne back into the cape and cowl. But, does he still have what it takes to fight crime in a new era?

films.title: Planes
films.overview: Dusty is a cropdusting plane who dreams of competing in a famous aerial race. The problem? He is hopelessly afraid of heights. With the support of his mentor Skipper and a host of new friends, Dusty sets off to make his dreams come true.

films.title: Minions & More Volume 1
films.overview: This collection of 10 short films produced by Illumination includes: From the "Despicable Me" franchise: Puppy (2013); Minion Scouts (2019); Training Wheels (2013); The Secret Life of Kyle (2017); Santa's Little Helpers (2019).  From the "Grinch" franchise: The Dog Days of Winter (2019).  From the "Secret Life of Pets" franchise: Norman Television (2016); Weenie (2016).  From the "Sing" franchise: Love at First Sight (2017).  From the "Lorax" franchise: Forces of Nature (2012).

films.title: A Turtle's Tale 2: Sammy's Escape from Paradise
films.overview: When Sammy and Ray find themselves trapped in The Tank, an underwater aquarium, they must hatch a plan to escape and reunite with their grandkids, Ricky and Ella, and protect them from the dangers of the ocean.

films.title: Space Chimps
films.overview: When an unmanned space shuttle crashes on an uncharted planet, a trio of astronaut chimpanzees are launched by NASA into a wormhole to investigate.

films.title: Batman vs Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
films.overview: Batman, Batgirl, and Robin forge an alliance with the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles to fight against the Turtles' sworn enemy, The Shredder, who has apparently teamed up with Ra's Al Ghul and The League of Assassins.

films.title: Riley's First Date?
films.overview: Riley, now 12, who is hanging out with her parents at home when potential trouble comes knocking. Mom's and Dad's Emotions find themselves forced to deal with Riley going on her first "date."

known_for: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 1
